shots.title: Enhanced slope init — post-install summary

hazards.description: PROVIDER_FILES maps omitted hooks directories for Cursor, Windsurf, and Cline — static maps drifted from actual installForProvider() behavior. Caught in code+architect review.
Unused cwd parameter accepted by printInstallSummary but never referenced. Caught in review.

shots.notes: Added printInstallSummary() with PROVIDER_FILES and PROVIDER_NEXT_STEPS maps (Partial<Record<InitProvider, ...>> for type safety). Exported InitProvider type for tests. 16 tests including edge case for unknown providers. Review caught 3 medium + 3 low findings — all fixed.

shots.title: Getting Started guide
shots.notes: Created docs/getting-started.md covering installation, quick start, core concepts, all 5 platform setups, common workflows, scorecard filing example, guard hooks, metaphors, troubleshooting, and next steps links. 351 lines.

shots.title: First Sprint tutorial
shots.notes: Created docs/tutorial-first-sprint.md with 6-part end-to-end walkthrough (setup, planning, during sprint, scoring, performance, planning sprint 2). Includes full annotated 4-ticket scorecard example and JSON schema appendix. 425 lines.

shots.title: README overhaul + package.json keywords

hazards.description: Removed 'slope' from package.json keywords during keyword update — caught in review nit.

shots.notes: Restructured README for external audience: value prop, quick start, core concepts, features by category, platform compatibility matrix, CLI quick reference, metaphor table, documentation links, contributing section. Updated package.json description and added keywords (ai-coding, agent-guidance, claude-code, cursor, windsurf, cline). 307 lines rewritten.

special_plays: Both-tier review (code + architect) conducted. Code review: 6 medium, 5 low, 5 nit findings. Architect review: 3 medium, 4 low. Overlap on key findings (PROVIDER_FILES drift, unused param, missing test assertions). All medium findings fixed before merge.

nutrition.description: Full build + typecheck + test suite after S40-1 code changes. 1818 tests passing at completion (1 new test file, 16 new tests).
5 commits on feature branch (4 tickets + 1 review fix). All pushed before merge. PR #23 squash-merged.
16 new tests in tests/cli/init-summary.test.ts covering all 6 providers, multiple providers, singular/plural labels, unknown provider edge case, and integration tests through initCommand.

Review caught PROVIDER_FILES/PROVIDER_NEXT_STEPS drift from actual install functions — static maps will need manual updates when new providers are added. Potential future improvement: have install functions return manifests.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Clean docs-heavy sprint. The init summary was the only code change — straightforward extraction into a testable function. The three doc files wrote quickly because the codebase is well-understood after 40 sprints.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: When adding static maps that describe dynamic behavior (like PROVIDER_FILES), use Partial<Record<T, ...>> for type safety and keep maps adjacent to the functions they describe. Review will catch drift between maps and install functions — the type system can't enforce this automatically.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The linter/external modification reverted init.ts changes mid-session, requiring a branch switch dance. Git stash conflicts with untracked files already on the target branch — delete the conflicting file first, then stash and checkout.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Phase 7 complete. External-facing docs are now in place for adoption. The framework, getting-started, and tutorial form a coherent documentation hierarchy.

bunker_locations: Static PROVIDER_FILES maps drift from installForProvider() — when adding a new provider or changing what gets installed, update both the install function AND the summary maps
Interactive init (--interactive) does not install providers and therefore does not show the post-install summary — this is intentional but may confuse users expecting a summary
Metaphor tables in docs have pre-existing inaccuracies for several metaphors (Tennis, Baseball, Gaming, D&D, Matrix) — values don't match actual code definitions
yardage_book_updates: src/cli/commands/init.ts: printInstallSummary(), PROVIDER_FILES, PROVIDER_NEXT_STEPS maps, exported InitProvider type
docs/getting-started.md: Installation, core concepts, platform setup, workflows, troubleshooting
docs/tutorial-first-sprint.md: End-to-end first sprint walkthrough with annotated scorecard
README.md: Restructured for external audience with platform matrix and CLI reference
package.json: Updated description and keywords for discoverability
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, par 4, score 4 — par. 2 in_the_hole (S40-2, S40-3 docs), 2 green (S40-1 review fixes, S40-4 keyword fix).
Slope 0 — single package, familiar patterns, docs-heavy sprint with one code change.
1202 lines added, 200 removed across 6 files. 2 new doc files, 1 new test file, 1 modified source file.
Both-tier review caught drift between static maps and install functions — fixed in review commit before merge.
